parsed.production_notes: The video features a split-screen layout. The top half is an AI-generated animated avatar with typical 3D rendering characteristics (smooth skin, stylized features). The bottom half is a human-recorded video of a real person.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female character. Young adult, fair complexion, large expressive brown eyes, and reddish-brown hair styled in a neat updo. She has a smooth, stylized appearance typical of modern 3D animation.
characters.wardrobe: A light green turtleneck sweater and small gold stud earrings.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, encouraging, and expressive, with animated facial movements.

characters.appearance: Real human female. Young adult, fair complexion, long dark brown hair, and dark eyes. She has a natural, unstyled look.
characters.wardrobe: A dark, possibly black or navy, turtleneck sweater.
characters.demeanor: Attentive, slightly hesitant when speaking, and focused on the interaction.

scenes.setting: Top panel: A softly lit, stylized room with a lamp and a potted plant in the background. Bottom panel: A dimly lit room with a wooden ceiling and a wall with some photos pinned to it.

panels.panel_visual_description: A 3D animated female character (Character A) is framed from the chest up in a medium close-up. She has reddish-brown hair in an updo and wears a light green turtleneck. The background is a softly blurred, stylized room featuring a warm-toned lamp on the left and a green potted plant on the right. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting her expressive face as she speaks.

A real human female (Character B) is framed from the chest up in a medium close-up. She has long dark hair and wears a dark turtleneck. The background shows a wooden ceiling and a wall with a few small photos pinned to it. The lighting is somewhat dim and warm, casting soft shadows on her face as she looks directly at the camera.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a split-screen layout with an animated AI tutor on top and a real human learner on the bottom. Both characters are framed as talking heads. Subtitles appear in the center of the screen, translating the spoken Italian. The AI tutor corrects the learner's mistakes, and the learner repeats the corrected phrases.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Parli italiano? [Do you speak Italian?]
Character B says: Sì, un po'. Io sono fame. [Yes, a little. I am hunger.]
Character A says: No, no. Si dice: ho fame. In italiano non sei fame, hai fame. [No, no. You say: I have hunger. In Italian you are not hunger, you have hunger.]
Character B says: Ho fame. [I have hunger.]
Character A says: Cosa vuoi mangiare? [What do you want to eat?]
Character B says: Voglio il pizza margherita. [I want the margherita pizza.]
Character A says: Attenta: la pizza. Pizza è femminile. [Careful: the pizza. Pizza is feminine.]
Character B says: Voglio la pizza margherita. [I want the margherita pizza.]
Character A says: E da bere? [And to drink?]
Character B says: Voglio uno acqua. [I want a water.]
Character A says: Meglio: vorrei un'acqua, per favore. Più educato. [Better: I would like a water, please. More polite.]
Character B says: Vorrei un'acqua, per favore. [I would like a water, please.]
Character A says: Perfetto! Vedi, il tuo italiano sta migliorando. [Perfect! See, your Italian is improving.]
Character B says: Grazie. Ma chi sei tu? [Thank you. But who are you?]
Character A says: Sono una tutor AI su Praktika. Parliamo così ogni giorno e il tuo italiano diventerà perfetto. [I am an AI tutor on Praktika. We speak like this every day and your Italian will become perfect.]
Character B says: Ok, proverò Praktika adesso. [Ok, I will try Praktika now.]

scenes.visual_description: A white screen displays the Praktika app logo in the center. Below the logo, there are two app store badges: 'GET IT ON Google Play' and 'Available on the App Store'.
scenes.on_screen_text:
praktika.ai
GET IT ON Google Play
Available on the App Store
